title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment · Evidence Triage
summary: A preserved decision record for problem discovery before solution commitment contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in problem evidence dossier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.
Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need
steps.instruction:
debug case — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

Inspect the Request Vs Need trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need, keep Request Vs Need connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Request Vs Need, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Request Vs Need precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Request Vs Need, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A stakeholder solution request is already a validated problem statement.

stimulus.title: Request Vs Need case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A stakeholder solution request is already a validated problem statement.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome. Artifact under review: problem evidence dossier.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Request Vs Need, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.

content.code:
pp1-discovery-noncommitment-1klnvr:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Discovery Noncommitment
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Discovery Noncommitment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Discovery Noncommitment, keep Discovery Noncommitment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record open questions and postpone feature commitment until the problem and constraints meet an explicit evidence threshold.
